1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
  2→
  3→import android.content.ClipData
  4→import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
  5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
  6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
  7→import org.wordpress.android.push.NativeNotificationsUtils
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.ActivityLauncher
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.PagePostCreationSourcesDetail.POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFeatureUtils
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.blaze.BlazeFlowSource
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.pages.SnackbarMessageHolder
 13→import org.wordpress.android.ui.photopicker.MediaPickerLauncher
 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.posts.RemotePreviewLogicHelper.RemotePreviewType
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefs
 16→import org.wordpress.android.ui.stories.intro.StoriesIntroDialogFragment
 17→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 18→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 19→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.clipboardManager
 20→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.helpers.ToastMessageHolder
 21→
 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 56→
 57→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 58→}
 59→
 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}
136→

204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft

208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled

259→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
260→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
261→        postStatus: PostStatus,
262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels
289→    }

291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {
299→                AppLog.e(
300→                    POSTS,
301→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
302→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
303→                )
304→                return null
305→            }
306→        }
307→    }

309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {
316→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
317→            uploadUiState,
318→            postStatus,
319→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
320→            hasAutoSave
321→        )
322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
325→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
326→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
327→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
328→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
329→            }
330→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
331→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
332→            }
333→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
334→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }
340→        return labels
341→    }

343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
344→        return when {
345→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
351→            )
352→
353→            else -> {
354→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
355→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
357→                } else {
358→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
359→                }
360→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
361→            }
362→        }
363→    }
364→
365→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
366→        return when {
367→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
368→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
369→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
370→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
371→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
372→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
373→            }
374→
375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
378→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
379→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
380→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
381→            }
382→
383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
384→        }
385→    }

388→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
389→        return performingCriticalAction ||
390→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
391→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))

394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(
429→                when {
430→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434→                }
435→            )
436→        }
437→
438→        if (canShowViewButton) {
439→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowStats) {
443→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowCopy) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448→        }
449→
450→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451→
452→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454→        }
455→
456→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458→        }
459→
460→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461→
462→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463→    }
464→
465→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
466→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
467→            { it.groupId },
468→            { it.positionInGroup }
469→        ))
470→    }
471→
472→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
473→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
474→    }
475→
476→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
477→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
478→        postStatus: PostStatus
479→    ) {
480→        when {
481→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
482→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
483→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
484→        }
485→    }
486→
487→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
488→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
489→
490→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
491→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
492→        }
493→    }
494→
495→    private fun createMoreActions(
496→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
497→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
498→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
499→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
500→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
501→        }
502→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
503→    }
504→}

 21→
 22→sealed class PostListAction {
 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()
 25→    class NewStoryPost(val site: SiteModel) : PostListAction()
 26→    class PreviewPost(
 27→        val site: SiteModel,
 28→        val post: PostModel,
 29→        val triggerPreviewStateUpdate: (PostListRemotePreviewState, PostInfoType) -> Unit,
 30→        val showToast: (ToastMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 31→        val messageMediaUploading: ToastMessageHolder
 32→    ) : PostListAction()
 33→
 34→    class RemotePreviewPost(
 35→        val site: SiteModel,
 36→        val post: PostModel,
 37→        val remotePreviewType: RemotePreviewType
 38→    ) : PostListAction()
 39→
 40→    class RetryUpload(
 41→        val post: PostModel,
 42→        val trackAnalytics: Boolean = PostUtils.isFirstTimePublish(post)
 43→    ) : PostListAction()
 44→
 45→    class CopyUrl(
 46→        val site: SiteModel,
 47→        val post: PostModel,
 48→        val showSnackbar: (SnackbarMessageHolder) -> Unit,
 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()
 52→
 53→    class ViewStats(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 54→    class ViewComments(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 55→    class ViewPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 56→    class DismissPendingNotification(val pushId: Int) : PostListAction()
 57→
 58→    class ShowPromoteWithBlaze(val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
 59→}
 60→
 61→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 62→fun handlePostListAction(
 63→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 64→    action: PostListAction,
 65→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 66→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 67→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 68→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 69→) {
 70→    when (action) {
 71→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 72→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 73→        }
 74→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 75→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 76→        }
 77→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 78→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 79→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 80→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 81→            } else {
 82→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 83→            }
 84→        }
 85→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 86→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 87→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 88→                activity = activity,
 89→                site = action.site,
 90→                post = action.post,
 91→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 92→            )
 93→        }
 94→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 95→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 96→        }
 97→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 98→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 99→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
100→                activity,
101→                action.post,
102→                action.trackAnalytics
103→            )
104→            activity.startService(intent)
105→        }
106→        is PostListAction.ViewComments -> {
107→            ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
108→        }
109→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
110→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
111→        }
112→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
113→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
114→        }
115→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
116→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
119→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
120→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
121→        }
122→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
123→            try {
124→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
125→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
126→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
127→
128→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
129→            } catch (e: Exception) {
130→                /**
131→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
132→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
133→                 */
134→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
135→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
136→            }
137→        }
138→    }
139→}

 71→ */
 72→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 73→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 74→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 75→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 76→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 77→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 78→) {
 79→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 80→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 81→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 82→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 83→        post: PostModel,
 84→        site: SiteModel,
 85→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 86→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 87→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 88→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 89→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 90→        formattedDate: String,
 91→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 92→        isSearch: Boolean,
 93→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 94→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 95→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 96→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 97→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 98→
 99→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
100→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
101→        }
102→        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
103→            postStatus = postStatus,
104→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
105→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
106→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
107→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
108→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
109→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
110→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
111→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
112→                site,
113→                postStatus,
114→                post
115→            ),
116→        )
117→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
119→
120→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
121→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
122→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
123→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
124→
125→        val title =
126→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
127→
128→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
129→            postStatus,
130→            formattedDate,
131→            post.authorDisplayName,
132→            authorFilterSelection,
133→            isSearch,
134→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
135→        )
136→        val statuses = getStatuses(
137→            postStatus = postStatus,
138→            post = post,
139→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
140→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
141→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
142→        )
143→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
144→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
145→        val onSelected = {
146→            when (postStatus) {
147→                TRASHED -> {
148→                    onAction.invoke(
149→                        post,
150→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
151→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
152→                    )
153→                }
154→
155→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
156→                    post,
157→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
158→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
159→                )
160→            }
161→        }
162→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
163→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
164→            localPostId = localPostId,
165→            title = title,
166→            excerpt = excerpt,
167→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
168→            postInfo = postInfo,
169→            statuses = statuses,
170→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
171→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
172→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
173→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
174→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
175→            ),
176→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
177→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
178→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
179→            ),
180→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
181→        )
182→
183→        return PostListItemUiState(
184→            data = itemUiData,
185→            moreActions = moreActions,
186→            onSelected = onSelected
187→        )
188→    }

190→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
191→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
192→        postStatus: PostStatus,
193→        formattedDate: String,
194→        displayName: String?,
195→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
196→        isSearch: Boolean,
197→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
198→    ): List<UiString> {
199→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
200→
201→        if (isSearch) {
202→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
203→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
204→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
205→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
206→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
207→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
208→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
209→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
210→            }
211→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
212→        }

240→    private fun getProgressBarState(

260→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
261→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
262→        postStatus: PostStatus,
263→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
264→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
265→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
266→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
267→        when {
268→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
269→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
270→            }
271→
272→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
273→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
274→            } else {
275→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
276→            }
277→
278→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
280→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
281→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
282→                    labels.add(it)
283→                }
284→            }
285→
286→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
287→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
288→        }

292→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
293→        return when (postStatus) {
294→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
295→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
296→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
297→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
298→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
299→            TRASHED -> {
300→                AppLog.e(
301→                    POSTS,
302→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
303→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
304→                )
305→                return null
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }

310→    private fun getStatuses(
311→        postStatus: PostStatus,
312→        post: PostModel,
313→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
314→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
315→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
316→    ): List<UiString> {
317→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
318→            uploadUiState,
319→            postStatus,
320→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
321→            hasAutoSave
322→        )
323→
324→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
325→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
326→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
327→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
328→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
329→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
330→            }
331→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
332→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
333→            }
334→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
335→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
336→            }
337→            if (post.sticky) {
338→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
339→            }

344→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
345→        return when {
346→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
347→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
348→                postStatus,

350→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
351→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload

367→        return when {

369→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
370→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)

376→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
377→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
378→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
379→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)

381→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
382→            }

389→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
390→        return performingCriticalAction ||
391→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
392→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
393→    }
394→
395→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
396→    private fun createButtonTypes(
397→        postStatus: PostStatus,
398→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
399→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
400→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
401→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
402→        statsSupported: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
404→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
405→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
406→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
407→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
408→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
409→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
410→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
411→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
412→
413→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
414→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
415→                !isLocalDraft &&
416→                !isLocallyChanged &&
417→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
418→        val canShowComments = postStatus == PUBLISHED && !isLocalDraft
419→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
420→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
421→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
422→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
423→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
424→
425→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
426→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
427→        }
428→
429→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
430→            buttonTypes.add(
431→                when {
432→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
433→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
434→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
435→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
436→                }
437→            )
438→        }
439→
440→        if (canShowViewButton) {
441→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
442→        }
443→
444→        if (canShowStats) {
445→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
446→        }
447→
448→        if (canShowComments) {
449→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COMMENTS)
450→        }
451→
452→        if (canShowCopy) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
454→        }
455→
456→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
457→
458→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
459→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
460→        }
461→
462→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
463→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
464→        }
465→
466→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
467→
468→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
469→    }
470→
471→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
472→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
473→            { it.groupId },
474→            { it.positionInGroup }
475→        ))
476→    }
477→
478→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
479→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
483→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
484→        postStatus: PostStatus
485→    ) {
486→        when {
487→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
488→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
489→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
490→        }
491→    }
492→
493→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
494→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
495→
496→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
497→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
498→        }
499→    }
500→
501→    private fun createMoreActions(
502→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
503→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
504→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
505→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
506→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
507→        }
508→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
509→    }
510→}

content.text:
The task is to implement the "comments" option tap logic for the UI Modernization Posts feature.
This involves ensuring the "Comments" button is displayed for relevant posts and that tapping it launches the comments view.

I have made the following changes:

1.  **`WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/viewmodel/posts/PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt`**:
    *   Imported `BUTTON_COMMENTS`.
    *   In `createButtonTypes`, added `canShowComments` logic. The comments button is shown for published posts (`postStatus == PUBLISHED` and `!isLocalDraft`).
    *   Added `BUTTON_COMMENTS` to the `buttonTypes` list if `canShowComments` is true.

2.  **`WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/PostListAction.kt`**:
    *   Added a new `ViewComments` action to the `PostListAction` sealed class. It takes `site` and `post` as parameters.
    *   In `handlePostListAction`, handled the `ViewComments` action by calling `ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)`.

3.  **`WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/PostActionHandler.kt`**:
    *   In `handlePostButton`, implemented the case for `BUTTON_COMMENTS`. It now triggers the `PostListAction.ViewComments` action with the current `site` and `post`.

These changes ensure that the "Comments" button appears for published posts and that tapping it launches the Unified Comments screen for the site. Currently, `UnifiedCommentsActivity` displays all comments for the site as there is no readily available mechanism to filter comments by post ID in the new Unified Comments UI (based on the `GetPageParameters` which only accepts `CommentFilter`). This seems to be the intended behavior or a limitation of the current migration state.

No new tests were created as per instructions to only create new test files if verifying changes, and existing tests were not modified.

Action taken:
- Read relevant files to understand the architecture.
- Modified `PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt` to include `BUTTON_COMMENTS`.
- Modified `PostListAction.kt` to define and handle `ViewComments`.
- Modified `PostActionHandler.kt` to trigger `ViewComments`.

I am confident these changes address the issue described.

```kotlin
// Example of changes in PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt
        val canShowComments = postStatus == PUBLISHED && !isLocalDraft
        // ...
        if (canShowComments) {
            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COMMENTS)
        }
```

```kotlin
// Example of changes in PostListAction.kt
    class ViewComments(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel) : PostListAction()
    // ...
        is PostListAction.ViewComments -> {
            ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
        }
```

```kotlin
// Example of changes in PostActionHandler.kt
            BUTTON_COMMENTS -> {
                triggerPostListAction.invoke(PostListAction.ViewComments(site, post))
            }
```

 23→    class EditPost(val site: SiteModel, val post: PostModel, val loadAutoSaveRevision: Boolean) : PostListAction()
 24→    class NewPost(val site: SiteModel, val isPromo: Boolean = false) : PostListAction()

 49→        val messageSuccess: SnackbarMessageHolder,
 50→        val messageError: SnackbarMessageHolder
 51→    ) : PostListAction()

 60→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 61→fun handlePostListAction(
 62→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 63→    action: PostListAction,
 64→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 65→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 66→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 67→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 68→) {
 69→    when (action) {
 70→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 71→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 72→        }
 73→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 74→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 75→        }
 76→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 77→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 78→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 79→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 80→            } else {
 81→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 85→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 86→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 87→                activity = activity,
 88→                site = action.site,
 89→                post = action.post,
 90→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 94→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 95→        }
 96→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 97→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 98→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
 99→                activity,
100→                action.post,
101→                action.trackAnalytics
102→            )
103→            activity.startService(intent)
104→        }
105→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
106→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
107→        }
108→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
109→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
110→        }
111→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
112→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
113→        }
114→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
115→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
116→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
119→            try {
120→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
121→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
122→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
123→
124→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
125→            } catch (e: Exception) {
126→                /**
127→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
128→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
129→                 */
130→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
131→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
132→            }
133→        }
134→    }
135→}

 78→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 79→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 80→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,

 83→        site: SiteModel,

 94→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 95→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 96→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 97→
 98→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->

107→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
108→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
109→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
110→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
111→                site,
112→                postStatus,
113→                post
114→            ),
115→        )
116→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
117→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→
119→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
120→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
121→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
122→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
123→
124→        val title =
125→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
126→
127→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
128→            postStatus,
129→            formattedDate,

131→            authorFilterSelection,
132→            isSearch,
133→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
134→        )
135→        val statuses = getStatuses(
136→            postStatus = postStatus,
137→            post = post,
138→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
139→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
140→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
141→        )
142→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
143→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
144→        val onSelected = {
145→            when (postStatus) {
146→                TRASHED -> {
147→                    onAction.invoke(
148→                        post,
149→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
150→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
151→                    )
152→                }
153→

155→                    post,
156→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
157→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
158→                )
159→            }
160→        }
161→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
162→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
163→            localPostId = localPostId,
164→            title = title,
165→            excerpt = excerpt,
166→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
167→            postInfo = postInfo,
168→            statuses = statuses,
169→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
170→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
171→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
172→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
173→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
174→            ),
175→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
176→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
177→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
178→            ),
179→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
180→        )
181→
182→        return PostListItemUiState(
183→            data = itemUiData,
184→            moreActions = moreActions,
185→            onSelected = onSelected
186→        )
187→    }

190→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
191→        postStatus: PostStatus,
192→        formattedDate: String,
193→        displayName: String?,
194→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
195→        isSearch: Boolean,
196→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
197→    ): List<UiString> {
198→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
199→
200→        if (isSearch) {
201→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
202→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
203→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
204→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
205→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
206→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
207→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
208→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
209→            }
210→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
211→        }
212→
213→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
214→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
215→        }
216→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
217→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
218→        }
219→        return uiStrings
220→    }

222→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
223→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
224→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
225→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
226→    }

228→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
229→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
230→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
231→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
232→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
233→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
234→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
235→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
236→        return parts.first()
237→    }

262→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
263→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
264→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
265→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
266→        when {
267→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
268→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
269→            }
270→
271→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
272→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
273→            } else {
274→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
275→            }
276→
277→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
278→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
280→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
281→                    labels.add(it)
282→                }
283→            }
284→
285→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
286→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
287→        }
288→        return labels

291→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
292→        return when (postStatus) {
293→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
294→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
295→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
296→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
297→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
298→            TRASHED -> {

309→    private fun getStatuses(
310→        postStatus: PostStatus,
311→        post: PostModel,
312→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
313→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
314→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
315→    ): List<UiString> {

320→            hasAutoSave

322→
323→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
324→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {

335→            }
336→            if (post.sticky) {
337→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
338→            }
339→        }

343→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {

346→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
347→                postStatus,
348→                false,
349→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
350→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload

353→            else -> {

356→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)

373→            }

375→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
376→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
377→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)

381→            }

383→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)

394→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
395→    private fun createButtonTypes(
396→        postStatus: PostStatus,
397→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
398→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
399→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
400→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
401→        statsSupported: Boolean,
402→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
404→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
405→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
406→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
407→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
408→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
409→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
410→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
411→
412→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
413→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
414→                !isLocalDraft &&
415→                !isLocallyChanged &&
416→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
417→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
418→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
419→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
420→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
421→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
422→
423→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
424→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
425→        }
426→
427→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
428→            buttonTypes.add(
429→                when {
430→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
431→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
432→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
433→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
434→                }
435→            )
436→        }
437→
438→        if (canShowViewButton) {
439→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
440→        }
441→
442→        if (canShowStats) {
443→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
444→        }
445→
446→        if (canShowCopy) {
447→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
448→        }
449→
450→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
451→
452→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
454→        }
455→
456→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
457→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
458→        }
459→
460→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
461→
462→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
463→    }

465→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
466→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
467→            { it.groupId },
468→            { it.positionInGroup }
469→        ))
470→    }

472→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
473→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
474→    }

476→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(

479→    ) {

483→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
484→        }
485→    }

487→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
488→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED

 61→@Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod", "ComplexMethod", "LongParameterList")
 62→fun handlePostListAction(
 63→    activity: FragmentActivity,
 64→    action: PostListAction,
 65→    remotePreviewLogicHelper: RemotePreviewLogicHelper,
 66→    previewStateHelper: PreviewStateHelper,
 67→    mediaPickerLauncher: MediaPickerLauncher,
 68→    blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 69→) {
 70→    when (action) {
 71→        is PostListAction.EditPost -> {
 72→            ActivityLauncher.editPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.loadAutoSaveRevision)
 73→        }
 74→        is PostListAction.NewPost -> {
 75→            ActivityLauncher.addNewPostForResult(activity, action.site, action.isPromo, POST_FROM_POSTS_LIST, -1, null)
 76→        }
 77→        is PostListAction.NewStoryPost -> {
 78→            if (AppPrefs.shouldShowStoriesIntro()) {
 79→                StoriesIntroDialogFragment.newInstance(action.site)
 80→                    .show(activity.supportFragmentManager, StoriesIntroDialogFragment.TAG)
 81→            } else {
 82→                mediaPickerLauncher.showStoriesPhotoPickerForResultAndTrack(activity, action.site)
 83→            }
 84→        }
 85→        is PostListAction.PreviewPost -> {
 86→            val helperFunctions = previewStateHelper.getUploadStrategyFunctions(activity, action)
 87→            remotePreviewLogicHelper.runPostPreviewLogic(
 88→                activity = activity,
 89→                site = action.site,
 90→                post = action.post,
 91→                helperFunctions = helperFunctions
 92→            )
 93→        }
 94→        is PostListAction.RemotePreviewPost -> {
 95→            ActivityLauncher.previewPostOrPageForResult(activity, action.site, action.post, action.remotePreviewType)
 96→        }
 97→        is PostListAction.RetryUpload -> {
 98→            // restart the UploadService with retry parameters
 99→            val intent = UploadService.getRetryUploadServiceIntent(
100→                activity,
101→                action.post,
102→                action.trackAnalytics
103→            )
104→            activity.startService(intent)
105→        }
106→        is PostListAction.ViewComments -> {
107→            ActivityLauncher.viewUnifiedComments(activity, action.site)
108→        }
109→        is PostListAction.ViewStats -> {
110→            ActivityLauncher.viewStatsSinglePostDetails(activity, action.site, action.post)
111→        }
112→        is PostListAction.ViewPost -> {
113→            ActivityLauncher.browsePostOrPage(activity, action.site, action.post)
114→        }
115→        is PostListAction.DismissPendingNotification -> {
116→            NativeNotificationsUtils.dismissNotification(action.pushId, activity)
117→        }
118→        is PostListAction.ShowPromoteWithBlaze -> {
119→            blazeFeatureUtils.trackEntryPointTapped(BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
120→            ActivityLauncher.openPromoteWithBlaze(activity, action.post, BlazeFlowSource.POSTS_LIST)
121→        }
122→        is PostListAction.CopyUrl -> {
123→            try {
124→                activity.clipboardManager?.setPrimaryClip(
125→                    ClipData.newPlainText("${action.post.id}", action.post.link)
126→                ) ?: throw NullPointerException("ClipboardManager is not supported on this device")
127→
128→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageSuccess)
129→            } catch (e: Exception) {
130→                /**
131→                 * Ignore any exceptions here as certain devices have bugs and will fail.
132→                 * See https://crrev.com/542cb9cfcc927295615809b0c99917b09a219d9f for more info.
133→                 */
134→                AppLog.e(AppLog.T.POSTS, e)
135→                action.showSnackbar.invoke(action.messageError)
136→            }
137→        }
138→    }
139→}

 70→ * Helper class which encapsulates logic for creating UiStates for items in the PostsList.
 71→ */
 72→class PostListItemUiStateHelper @Inject constructor(
 73→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 74→    private val uploadUiStateUseCase: PostModelUploadUiStateUseCase,
 75→    private val labelColorUseCase: PostPageListLabelColorUseCase,
 76→    private val jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper: JetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper,
 77→    private val blazeFeatureUtils: BlazeFeatureUtils
 78→) {
 79→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "LongMethod")
 80→    fun createPostListItemUiState(
 81→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
 82→        isFilteringByAuthorSupported: Boolean,
 83→        post: PostModel,
 84→        site: SiteModel,
 85→        unhandledConflicts: Boolean,
 86→        hasAutoSave: Boolean,
 87→        capabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
 88→        statsSupported: Boolean,
 89→        featuredImageUrl: String?,
 90→        formattedDate: String,
 91→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean,
 92→        isSearch: Boolean,
 93→        uploadStatusTracker: PostModelUploadStatusTracker,
 94→        onAction: (PostModel, PostListButtonType, AnalyticsTracker.Stat) -> Unit,
 95→    ): PostListItemUiState {
 96→        val postStatus: PostStatus = PostStatus.fromPost(post)
 97→        val uploadUiState = uploadUiStateUseCase.createUploadUiState(post, site, uploadStatusTracker)
 98→
 99→        val onButtonClicked = { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
100→            onAction.invoke(post, buttonType, POST_LIST_BUTTON_PRESSED)
101→        }
102→        val buttonTypes = createButtonTypes(
103→            postStatus = postStatus,
104→            isLocalDraft = post.isLocalDraft,
105→            isLocallyChanged = post.isLocallyChanged,
106→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
107→            siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish = capabilitiesToPublish,
108→            statsSupported = statsSupported,
109→            shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase =
110→            jetpackFeatureRemovalPhaseHelper.shouldShowPublishedPostStatsButton(),
111→            shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze = blazeFeatureUtils.isPostBlazeEligible(
112→                site,
113→                postStatus,
114→                post
115→            ),
116→        )
117→        // val defaultActions = createDefaultViewActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
118→        val moreActions = createMoreActions(buttonTypes, onButtonClicked)
119→
120→        val remotePostId = RemotePostId(RemoteId(post.remotePostId))
121→        val localPostId = LocalPostId(LocalId(post.id))
122→        val baseTitle = getTitle(post = post)
123→        val excerpt = getExcerpt(post = post)
124→
125→        val title =
126→            if (baseTitle == UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses) && excerpt != null) null else baseTitle
127→
128→        val postInfo = getPostInfoLabels(
129→            postStatus,
130→            formattedDate,
131→            post.authorDisplayName,
132→            authorFilterSelection,
133→            isSearch,
134→            isFilteringByAuthorSupported
135→        )
136→        val statuses = getStatuses(
137→            postStatus = postStatus,
138→            post = post,
139→            uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
140→            hasUnhandledConflicts = unhandledConflicts,
141→            hasAutoSave = hasAutoSave
142→        )
143→        val statusesColor = labelColorUseCase.getLabelsColor(post, uploadUiState, unhandledConflicts, hasAutoSave)
144→        val statusesDelimiter = UiStringRes(R.string.multiple_status_label_delimiter)
145→        val onSelected = {
146→            when (postStatus) {
147→                TRASHED -> {
148→                    onAction.invoke(
149→                        post,
150→                        BUTTON_SHOW_MOVE_TRASHED_POST_TO_DRAFT_DIALOG,
151→                        POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
152→                    )
153→                }
154→
155→                UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED, DRAFT, PRIVATE, PENDING, SCHEDULED -> onAction.invoke(
156→                    post,
157→                    BUTTON_EDIT,
158→                    POST_LIST_ITEM_SELECTED
159→                )
160→            }
161→        }
162→        val itemUiData = PostListItemUiStateData(
163→            remotePostId = remotePostId,
164→            localPostId = localPostId,
165→            title = title,
166→            excerpt = excerpt,
167→            imageUrl = featuredImageUrl,
168→            postInfo = postInfo,
169→            statuses = statuses,
170→            statusesColor = statusesColor,
171→            statusesDelimiter = statusesDelimiter,
172→            progressBarUiState = getProgressBarState(
173→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
174→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
175→            ),
176→            showOverlay = shouldShowOverlay(
177→                uploadUiState = uploadUiState,
178→                performingCriticalAction = performingCriticalAction
179→            ),
180→            disableRippleEffect = postStatus == TRASHED
181→        )
182→
183→        return PostListItemUiState(
184→            data = itemUiData,
185→            moreActions = moreActions,
186→            onSelected = onSelected
187→        )
188→    }

190→    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
191→    private fun getPostInfoLabels(
192→        postStatus: PostStatus,
193→        formattedDate: String,
194→        displayName: String?,
195→        authorFilterSelection: AuthorFilterSelection,
196→        isSearch: Boolean,
197→        isAuthorFilterVisible: Boolean
198→    ): List<UiString> {
199→        val uiStrings: MutableList<UiString> = mutableListOf()
200→
201→        if (isSearch) {
202→            val postStatusText = when (postStatus) {
203→                UNKNOWN -> R.string.unknown
204→                PUBLISHED -> R.string.post_status_post_published
205→                DRAFT -> R.string.post_status_draft
206→                PRIVATE -> R.string.post_status_post_private
207→                PENDING -> R.string.post_status_pending_review
208→                TRASHED -> R.string.post_status_post_trashed
209→                SCHEDULED -> R.string.post_status_post_scheduled
210→            }
211→            uiStrings.add(UiStringRes(postStatusText))
212→        }
213→
214→        if (formattedDate.isNotBlank()) {
215→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(formattedDate))
216→        }
217→        if (isAuthorFilterVisible && authorFilterSelection == EVERYONE && !displayName.isNullOrBlank()) {
218→            uiStrings.add(UiStringText(displayName))
219→        }
220→        return uiStrings
221→    }

223→    private fun getTitle(post: PostModel): UiString {
224→        return if (post.title.isNotBlank()) {
225→            UiStringText(StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(post.title).let { HtmlUtils.stripHtml(it) })
226→        } else UiStringRes(R.string.untitled_in_parentheses)
227→    }
228→
229→    private fun getExcerpt(post: PostModel): UiString? =
230→        PostUtils.getPostListExcerptFromPost(post)
231→            .takeIf { !it.isNullOrBlank() }
232→            ?.let { StringEscapeUtils.unescapeHtml4(it) }
233→            ?.let { PostUtils.collapseShortcodes(it) }
234→            ?.let { UiStringText(getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(it)) }
235→    private fun getTextBeforeLargeSpaceGap(input: String): String {
236→        val parts = input.split(Regex("\\s+\\n+"))
237→        return parts.first()
238→    }

240→    private fun getProgressBarState(
241→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
242→        performingCriticalAction: Boolean
243→    ): ProgressBarUiState {
244→        return if (shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState, performingCriticalAction)) {
245→            if (uploadUiState is UploadingMedia) {
246→                ProgressBarUiState.Determinate(uploadUiState.progress)
247→            } else {
248→                ProgressBarUiState.Indeterminate
249→            }
250→        } else {
251→            ProgressBarUiState.Hidden
252→        }
253→    }
254→
255→    private fun shouldShowProgress(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
256→        return performingCriticalAction || uploadUiState is UploadingPost || uploadUiState is UploadingMedia ||
257→                uploadUiState is UploadQueued
258→    }
259→
260→    private fun getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
261→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
262→        postStatus: PostStatus,
263→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
264→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
265→    ): MutableList<UiString> {
266→        val labels: MutableList<UiString> = ArrayList()
267→        when {
268→            uploadUiState is UploadFailed -> {
269→                getErrorLabel(uploadUiState, postStatus).let { labels.add(it) }
270→            }
271→
272→            uploadUiState is UploadingPost -> if (uploadUiState.isDraft) {
273→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading_draft))
274→            } else {
275→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_uploading))
276→            }
277→
278→            uploadUiState is UploadingMedia -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.uploading_media))
279→            uploadUiState is UploadQueued -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_queued))
280→            uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection -> {
281→                getWaitingForConnectionStatus(uploadUiState.postStatus)?.let {
282→                    labels.add(it)
283→                }
284→            }
285→
286→            hasUnhandledConflicts -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_is_conflicted))
287→            hasAutoSave -> labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_post_autosave_revision_available))
288→        }
289→        return labels
290→    }
291→
292→    private fun getWaitingForConnectionStatus(postStatus: PostStatus): UiString? {
293→        return when (postStatus) {
294→            UNKNOWN, PUBLISHED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_publish))
295→            PRIVATE -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_private))
296→            PENDING -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_pending))
297→            SCHEDULED -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_scheduled))
298→            DRAFT -> (UiStringRes(R.string.post_waiting_for_connection_draft))
299→            TRASHED -> {
300→                AppLog.e(
301→                    POSTS,
302→                    "Developer error: This state shouldn't happen. Trashed post is in " +
303→                            "UploadWaitingForConnection state."
304→                )
305→                return null
306→            }
307→        }
308→    }
309→
310→    private fun getStatuses(
311→        postStatus: PostStatus,
312→        post: PostModel,
313→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
314→        hasUnhandledConflicts: Boolean,
315→        hasAutoSave: Boolean
316→    ): List<UiString> {
317→        val labels = getErrorAndProgressStatuses(
318→            uploadUiState,
319→            postStatus,
320→            hasUnhandledConflicts,
321→            hasAutoSave
322→        )
323→
324→        // we want to show either single error/progress label or 0-n info labels.
325→        if (labels.isEmpty()) {
326→            if (post.isLocalDraft) {
327→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_draft))
328→            } else if (post.isLocallyChanged) {
329→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.local_changes))
330→            }
331→            if (postStatus == PRIVATE) {
332→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_post_private))
333→            }
334→            if (postStatus == PENDING) {
335→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_pending_review))
336→            }
337→            if (post.sticky) {
338→                labels.add(UiStringRes(R.string.post_status_sticky))
339→            }
340→        }
341→        return labels
342→    }
343→
344→    private fun getErrorLabel(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiString {
345→        return when {
346→            uploadUiState.error.mediaError != null -> getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState, postStatus)
347→            uploadUiState.error.postError != null -> UploadUtils.getErrorMessageResIdFromPostError(
348→                postStatus,
349→                false,
350→                uploadUiState.error.postError,
351→                uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload
352→            )
353→
354→            else -> {
355→                val errorMsg = "MediaError and postError are both null."
356→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
357→                    throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
358→                } else {
359→                    AppLog.e(POSTS, errorMsg)
360→                }
361→                UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic)
362→            }
363→        }
364→    }
365→
366→    private fun getMediaUploadErrorMessage(uploadUiState: UploadFailed, postStatus: PostStatus): UiStringRes {
367→        return when {
368→            uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload -> when (postStatus) {
369→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying)
370→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_retrying_private)
371→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled_retrying)
372→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted_retrying)
373→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_generic_error_retrying)
374→            }
375→
376→            uploadUiState.retryWillPushChanges -> when (postStatus) {
377→                PUBLISHED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published)
378→                PRIVATE -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_published_private)
379→                SCHEDULED -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_scheduled)
380→                PENDING -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post_not_submitted)
381→                DRAFT, TRASHED, UNKNOWN -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
382→            }
383→
384→            else -> UiStringRes(R.string.error_media_recover_post)
385→        }
386→    }

388→    private fun shouldShowOverlay(uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState, performingCriticalAction: Boolean): Boolean {
389→        // show overlay when post upload is in progress or (media upload is in progress and the user is not using Aztec)
390→        return performingCriticalAction ||
391→                (uploadUiState is UploadingPost ||
392→                        (!appPrefsWrapper.isAztecEditorEnabled && uploadUiState is UploadingMedia))
393→    }
