395→    @Suppress("LongParameterList", "ComplexMethod")
396→    private fun createButtonTypes(
397→        postStatus: PostStatus,
398→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
399→        isLocallyChanged: Boolean,
400→        uploadUiState: PostUploadUiState,
401→        siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish: Boolean,
402→        statsSupported: Boolean,
403→        shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase: Boolean,
404→        shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze: Boolean
405→    ): List<PostListButtonType> {
406→        val canRetryUpload = uploadUiState is UploadFailed
407→        val canCancelPendingAutoUpload = (uploadUiState is UploadWaitingForConnection ||
408→                (uploadUiState is UploadFailed && uploadUiState.isEligibleForAutoUpload))
409→        val canPublishPost = (canRetryUpload || uploadUiState is NothingToUpload || !canCancelPendingAutoUpload) &&
410→                (isLocallyChanged || isLocalDraft || postStatus == DRAFT ||
411→                        (siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish && postStatus == PENDING))
412→
413→        val canShowStats = statsSupported &&
414→                postStatus == PUBLISHED &&
415→                !isLocalDraft &&
416→                !isLocallyChanged &&
417→                shouldShowStatsInJetpackRemovalPhase
418→        val canShowComments = postStatus == PUBLISHED && !isLocalDraft
419→        val canShowCopy = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == DRAFT
420→        val canShowCopyUrlButton = !isLocalDraft && postStatus != TRASHED
421→        val canShowViewButton = !canRetryUpload && postStatus != TRASHED
422→        val canShowPublishButton = canRetryUpload || canPublishPost
423→        val buttonTypes = ArrayList<PostListButtonType>()
424→
425→        if (canCancelPendingAutoUpload) {
426→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_CANCEL_PENDING_AUTO_UPLOAD)
427→        }
428→
429→        if (canShowPublishButton) {
430→            buttonTypes.add(
431→                when {
432→                    canRetryUpload -> BUTTON_RETRY
433→                    !siteHasCapabilitiesToPublish -> BUTTON_SUBMIT
434→                    postStatus == SCHEDULED && isLocallyChanged -> BUTTON_SYNC
435→                    else -> BUTTON_PUBLISH
436→                }
437→            )
438→        }
439→
440→        if (canShowViewButton) {
441→            buttonTypes.addViewOrPreviewAction(isLocalDraft || isLocallyChanged)
442→        }
443→
444→        if (canShowStats) {
445→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_STATS)
446→        }
447→
448→        if (canShowComments) {
449→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COMMENTS)
450→        }
451→
452→        if (canShowCopy) {
453→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY)
454→        }
455→
456→        buttonTypes.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus)
457→
458→        if (canShowCopyUrlButton) {
459→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_COPY_URL)
460→        }
461→
462→        if (shouldShowPromoteWithBlaze) {
463→            buttonTypes.add(BUTTON_PROMOTE_WITH_BLAZE)
464→        }
465→
466→        buttonTypes.addDeletingOrTrashAction(isLocalDraft, postStatus)
467→
468→        return sortPostListButtons(buttonTypes)
469→    }
470→
471→    private fun sortPostListButtons(list: List<PostListButtonType>): List<PostListButtonType> {
472→        return list.sortedWith(compareBy(
473→            { it.groupId },
474→            { it.positionInGroup }
475→        ))
476→    }
477→
478→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addViewOrPreviewAction(shouldShowPreview: Boolean) {
479→        add(if (shouldShowPreview) BUTTON_PREVIEW else BUTTON_VIEW)
480→    }
481→
482→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addDeletingOrTrashAction(
483→        isLocalDraft: Boolean,
484→        postStatus: PostStatus
485→    ) {
486→        when {
487→            isLocalDraft -> add(BUTTON_DELETE)
488→            postStatus == TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_DELETE_PERMANENTLY)
489→            postStatus != TRASHED -> add(BUTTON_TRASH)
490→        }
491→    }
492→
493→    private fun MutableList<PostListButtonType>.addMoveToDraftActionIfAvailable(postStatus: PostStatus) {
494→        val canMovePostToDraft = postStatus == PUBLISHED || postStatus == TRASHED
495→
496→        if (canMovePostToDraft) {
497→            add(BUTTON_MOVE_TO_DRAFT)
498→        }
499→    }
500→
501→    private fun createMoreActions(
502→        buttonTypes: List<PostListButtonType>,
503→        onButtonClicked: (PostListButtonType) -> Unit
504→    ): PostListItemAction.MoreItem {
505→        val allItems = buttonTypes.map { buttonType: PostListButtonType ->
506→            PostListItemAction.SingleItem(buttonType, onButtonClicked)
507→        }
508→        return PostListItemAction.MoreItem(allItems, onButtonClicked)
509→    }
510→}
